sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM for BLUE_GATE PBA SMD under GATE Ass'y, listing PCB and SMD components with quantities, references, part numbers, specifications, and vendors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Component bill of materials; no regulatory authority, jurisdiction, or standard is stated in the source text.
keyPoints: Assembly line states "GATE Ass'y" and "FR4 4L_398mm x 40.5mm x 1.2T(BLUE) Rev.03 적용".
Table columns include Item, Quantity, Reference, CODE, 공정, 품목명, 업체 P/N, 규격, 업체 약어, 비고, 업체명, 담당자.
The BOM lists BLUE_GATE PCB plus SMD components including beads, FPC/FFC/PIC connectors, pads, analog switches, level translators, I/O expander, resistors, and capacitors.

entities.name: Texas Instruments
entities.evidence: IC-Switch,TS5A23157DGSR,"Analog Switch ICs Dual 10-Ohm SPDT Analog Switch,MSOP-10",Texas Instruments

evidence.claim: The BOM applies to GATE Ass'y and references FR4 4L 398mm x 40.5mm x 1.2T(BLUE) Rev.03.
The document includes a BLUE_GATE PBA SMD section.
Item 1 is a BLUE_GATE PCB with FR4, 4Layer, T1.2, 398*40.5 specification.
The table records quantities, references, process, item names, vendor part numbers, specifications, and vendor information.
The BOM lists Texas Instruments ICs including TS5A23157DGSR, TS5A3157DCKR, LSF0108PWR, and TCA9539RGER.
